message:
Command `# All 13 ODB files patched (12 above + the step 44 already done earlier = 13 total).
# Now resume from GlobalPlacement using the clean step 44 ODB
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --last-run \
    --from OpenROAD.GlobalPlacement \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_gpl.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid
sleep 15
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log` executed with exit code 0.
